scripts.lint: bun run --cwd apps/web lint && bun run --cwd packages/shared lint && bun run --cwd packages/contracts lint
scripts.format: bun run --cwd apps/web format && bun run --cwd packages/shared format && bun run --cwd packages/contracts format
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/contracts typecheck
scripts.validate:fast: bun lint && bun typecheck && bun run server:test
scripts.validate:full: bun run validate:fast && bun run --cwd apps/web test && bun run build && bun run --cwd apps/server build && bun run android:lint && bun run android:assemble
scripts.validate:web: bun run --cwd apps/web lint && bun run --cwd packages/shared lint && bun run --cwd packages/contracts lint && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/contracts typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web test && bun run build
scripts.validate:server: bun run server:test && bun run --cwd apps/server build
scripts.validate:android: bun run android:lint && bun run android:assemble
